tagline: Take a vacation in your own backyard

hero.headline:
Three Generations of Backyard
Paradise
hero.subheadline: For over 60 years, Staten Island families have trusted Holly Hill Pool & Patio for pools, equipment, expert repairs, and everything in between. We sell fun -- guaranteed.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Your One-Stop Shop for<br class="hidden md:block"> Backyard Fun
services.subtitle: From swimming pools and expert water care to sheds, awnings, and poolside structures -- Holly Hill has everything to turn your backyard into a year-round retreat.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: In-ground and above-ground pool sales and installation featuring Sharkline brand pools, with expert guidance to find the perfect fit for your yard.

cards.title: Pool Chemicals & Water Testing
cards.description: Complete chemical programs plus FREE computerized water testing to keep your pool balanced, crystal clear, and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Equipment & Repairs
cards.description: Filters, heaters, pumps, liners, safety covers, and automatic vacuums -- plus a full-service repair center staffed by seasoned technicians.

cards.title: Storage Sheds
cards.description: Custom storage sheds in New England, Garden Cottage, and Traditional Vinyl styles that complement your backyard and keep everything organized.

cards.title: Poolside Structures & Awnings
cards.description: Beautiful poolside pavilions and premium retractable awnings from Sunsetter and Aristocrat to create shade and style for outdoor living.

cards.title: Accessories & Supplies
cards.description: Ladders, steps, automatic vacuums, pool toys, and seasonal supplies -- everything you need to enjoy your pool from opening day to closing.

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Stop by our Staten Island store or give us a call. Our friendly, knowledgeable staff will help you explore options and answer every question -- no pressure, just honest advice.

steps.title: We Set You Up Right
steps.description: From pool selection and installation to FREE water testing and chemical programs, we handle the details so you get exactly what your backyard needs.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Dive in, relax under a new awning, or fire up the grill next to your poolside pavilion. With Holly Hill behind you, your backyard becomes your favorite vacation spot.

about.label: Why Staten Island Trusts Us
about.headline: Three Generations of Family, One Mission: Your Backyard
about.description: Since 1965, Holly Hill Pool & Patio has been a Staten Island family business -- now in its third generation. We built our reputation the old-fashioned way: quality products, honest advice, and treating every customer like a neighbor. As a BioGuard Platinum Dealer with a full on-site repair center, we have the expertise and inventory to solve any pool problem and make any backyard dream a reality.

features.title: 60+ Years Family-Owned
features.description: Three generations of the same family, serving the same community since 1965. We know Staten Island backyards like no one else.

features.title: FREE Water Testing
features.description: Bring in a water sample and our computerized system gives you a precise chemical prescription -- no charge, no obligation, every time.

features.title: Full On-Site Repair Center
features.description: Our in-house technicians fix filters, motors, and automatic vacuums right here. No sending parts away and waiting weeks.

pricing.headline: Fair Prices. Family Values.
pricing.subtitle: Quality products and expert service at prices that respect your budget. Stop by for a free quote on any project.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Fun" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any product or service, let us know and we'll make it right. Three generations of our family have staked our name on delivering quality and honest service -- and that promise isn't going anywhere.

faqs.question: Do you install both in-ground and above-ground pools?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry and install both in-ground and above-ground swimming pools, including our popular Sharkline brand. Visit our showroom or call us and we'll help you pick the perfect pool for your space and budget.

faqs.question: Is the water testing really free?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bring in a water sample anytime and our computerized testing system will analyze it and give you a precise chemical prescription -- completely free, no purchase required. We want every pool in Staten Island crystal clear.

faqs.question: Can you repair my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a full on-site repair and service center for filters, motors, automatic vacuums, and more. Our experienced technicians can diagnose and fix most issues quickly so you get back to enjoying your pool.

faqs.question: Do you only sell pool-related products?
faqs.answer: Not at all! In addition to pools and pool supplies, we carry storage sheds, poolside structures, retractable awnings from Sunsetter and Aristocrat, and even chicken coops. We're your complete backyard outfitter.

faqs.question: How long has Holly Hill been in business?
faqs.answer: Holly Hill Pool & Patio has been family-owned and operated since 1965 -- that's over 60 years and three generations dedicated to helping Staten Island families create their perfect backyard.

testimonials.name: Zoey
testimonials.text: They are truly amazing to deal with and are very professional, making our pool experience easy. I wouldn't go anywhere else for pool supplies.

testimonials.name: John B.
testimonials.text: Holly Hill surpasses all other pool stores in customer service. Their staff is knowledgeable and friendly -- they always take the time to help.

testimonials.name: Aj
testimonials.text: Staff is always so helpful and never pushy. Prices are reasonable and overall a great experience. This is the only pool store I trust.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Stop by our Staten Island showroom, call us, or send a message. Free water testing, honest advice, and 60+ years of expertise -- all waiting for you.

footer.description: Family-owned since 1965. Three generations serving Staten Island backyards.
